what_was_done: Session 236: Token optimization sprint. Updated 7 HTML docs to v2.5.4 accuracy (sent via Telegram). Compressed CLAUDE.md + 3 rules files saving ~1,086 tokens/prompt with zero functionality lost. Moved domain system to dormant/ (discovered .dormant extension doesn't prevent rules/ loading). Dormanted telegram_search tool. Added auto-index URL hook to user_prompt_capture.py — URLs in user messages auto-indexed to LanceDB web_pages in background. Confirmed web system was already on LanceDB (chromadb_socket name is legacy). Cleaned ChromaDB→LanceDB naming in web scripts + analytics. Deleted obsolete run_migration.py. Fixed Lever1 test. Full branch comparison: evolution-branch is 61% leaner per-prompt than master. 1437 pass, 2 fail (pre-existing).
next_steps: Build Claude API adapter for agent-bench (real API scoring)
Consider removing ChromaDB pip dependency entirely (only legacy naming remains)
Memory maintenance — DB at 1431 entries, run stale cleanup
Fix remaining 2 test failures (UDS fallback, MemMentor socket)
known_issues: Plan mode exit loop - platform limitation, mitigated by behavioral rule
LanceDB flat scan ~3x slower than ChromaDB HNSW (30ms vs 10ms) — acceptable at current scale
test_framework.py Pyright import errors for shared modules (path resolution)
chromadb_socket.py module name is legacy — routes to LanceDB, rename is high-risk/low-value
